subject: Condition Report Returned | 13 President Street, Kirwan 4817

data.bodyText:
Dear Simmona

Property: 13 President Street, Kirwan 4817

RE: Condition Report Returned

Your tenants have returned their Entry Condition Report. Please find below a link to the signed Condition Report for 13 President Street, Kirwan 4817.
The Entry Condition Report holds immense significance, as it stands as the authoritative document for future reference at the conclusion of the tenancy period. Legally, it ranks among the most pivotal documents we compile for a tenancy. Your tenants have received a copy for their own records. I have attached a copy of this report for your perusal. It’s always a good idea to look through the report to stay familiar with the condition of your property from tenancy to tenancy.

Click on the link below to download the report for your records.

subject: 13 President Application

data.bodyText:
Hi Marel,

I'm just following up regarding the applicant I presented on Tuesday.

They are very interested in the property, and I would hate for you to miss out on securing them. If I don't hear back from you by the end of business today, I will proceed with issuing a 6-month lease at $500 per week to ensure we don't lose the opportunity.

I have left you a brief voicemail as well to explain.

Kind Regards

Caitlin Wheeler
Property Manager
McGrath Estate Agents
Townsville
M     0439 674 141
D      07 4781 0500
W     mcgrath.com.au<http://mcgrath.com.au/>

Report Maintenance Here<https://tapi.app/embed/bot/web?management_id=5c90068c-e792-47ba-afce-ce1f783933e8>

If you would like to pass on feedback in relation to the service you are receiving, please contact my manager via kayematheson@mcgrath.com.au<mailto:kayematheson@mcgrath.com.au>
Being a referral based business, the best compliment any client can give is the referral of a friend, family member or colleague wh

subject: Exit Inspection Report | 13 President Street, Kirwan 4817

data.bodyText:
Dear Simmona,

RE: EXIT CONDITION REPORT

 Property: 
 13 President Street, Kirwan 4817
 

 Date of Inspection: 
 Fri 20/02/2026

 

I’m pleased to inform you that the tenants have vacated the property, and the final inspection was completed. The property was returned in excellent condition, with not noticeable damage. We will be getting the lawns mowed and taking it from the tenants bond. Please note there was some slight wear and tear presented in the property, we have made notes of then in the report.
We have processed the necessary steps to refund the tenant’s bond in full.
We have supplied a copy of your Exit Condition Report for your record. Please click the following link to download a copy of the exit condition report.

 Exit Inspection Report
 Please use the following code to access your document: 831904

 This link will expire in 30 days.

 
 

Have a good day, should you have any queries, please contact me on 07 4781 0500 to discuss.

 Yours sincerely,

 Caitlin

subject: AUTO REPLY (Office Closed) - Elite PM Agency

data.issue: Hello Marel, Thank you for your email – it has been received into a generic inbox.  In this digital age we receive hundreds of emails each day.Our roles as Estate Agents see us in and out of the office across the working day.We attend routine inspections, meet with owners and tenants, perform key collections and open home inspections (among other things). Unfortunately we are not able to respond to you instantly, however we will respond to your as soon as practicable.  If your matter is of an urgent nature, please phone our office & one of our lovely staff members will be able to assist you (02) 6056 9688 In the mean time our owner and tenant portal/app is live and may be able to provide you what you need. Check it out! With PropertyMe’s owner & tenant mobile app, there’s so much you can do:OWNERS (PropertyMe Owner)View all your property and rental informationTake a deep dive into your rental income details and expensesView upcoming events like jobs and inspectionsAccess all your financial documentsDownload and share all your documents with your financial consultantTENANTS (PropertyMe Tenant)View all your relevant property and lease informationSee when your rent and invoices are dueLog maintenance requests and add photos or videos for extra detailSee upcoming events like inspectionsDownload and share all your relevant documents including invoices, receipts and lease agreements How do you use the app?1. Download the app from the App Store or Google Play2. Login with your PropertyMe email address and password3. If you don’t have a PropertyMe account, you will need to create one    Please let me know if you have any questions. Kind regards,Your Property Management TeamElite Property Management Agency(02) 6056 9688

Underground Leak

data.issue: We were recently made aware of an item at your property that requires some maintenance, we've summarised the details below.
data.bodyText:
Email

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 | 
 
 
 
 | 
 
 
 
 | 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dear Marel-Kim Pencev & Simonna Chimone Pencev,
We were recently made aware of an item at your property that requires some maintenance, we've summarised the details below.
URGENT: Air-Conditioner Replacement
06/02/2026
Wello's Plumbing and Gas have attended the property and advised that the air-conditioner unit is in extremely poor condition. They believe the most economical solution is to replace the unit:
"Quote to supply and install new Coolair CPQ850, run new wire, install new controller, test operation, take away rubbish and old unit $3150+gst "
SM
We request your approval to attend this item if you could respond by return email.
If you have any questions or would like to discuss I can be reached on the numbers below.
Regards
Sophia MulkearnsElite Property Management Agency02 6056 9688sophia@elitepmagency.com.auwww.elitepmagency.com.au

subject: PUBLIC HOLIDAY - OFFICE CLOSURE

data.bodyText:
Good morning,

Our office will be shut for the Public Holiday on Monday 26/01/2026.
Our office will re-open on Tuesday 27/01/2026 at 8:30am.

Our after hours phone will still be monitored for emergencies only.
